text.title: Hierarchical Build Procedure
text.summary: Six-step procedure from spec to a green hierarchical run.

section.title: Procedure
section.code:
STEP 1 — Validate spec input: MultiAgentSpec with pattern=hierarchical action: scripts/validate-multi-agent-basics.py + scripts/validate-multi-agent-hierarchical.py output: validated spec gate: validators exit 0
STEP 2 — Manager planning input: task + worker roster (names + roles only — no prompts) action: call manager LLM with system_prompt + roster + plan-schema.json output: Plan JSON gate: JSON parses against schema; if not, one repair attempt with parse error
STEP 3 — Cycle check input: Plan action: build adjacency graph from assignments[].deps[]; DFS / Kahn's algorithm output: ordered_assignments OR cycle list gate: no cycles; otherwise return cycle to manager for re-planning
STEP 4 — Dispatch input: ordered_assignments + worker registry action: for each assignment in topological order, call worker LLM with subtask + prior dependency results; apply timeout_s; respect failure_policy output: WorkerResult per assignment gate: all `ok` OR partial set consistent with failure_policy
STEP 5 — Gather input: WorkerResult[] action: collect into manager-readable format; flag any `timeout`/`error` per failure_policy output: gathered_results gate: trace complete
STEP 6 — Synthesize input: task + gathered_results action: call manager LLM with synthesis system prompt + all results simultaneously (no streaming) output: Synthesis envelope {final_result, used_tokens, trace} gate: final_result.payload not null OR `partial=true` declared
